title: Website Design
description: Skilled in website design and development, specializing in full-stack solutions using the MERN stack. Expertise in both frontend and backend technologies for dynamic applications.

title: Application Development
description: Dynamic full-stack developer specializing in creating robust applications with React Native. Proficient in both frontend and backend development, delivering seamless user experiences and innovative solutions.

title: Software Testing
description: Proficient in software testing, including test planning, execution, and defect tracking. Skilled in manual testing, creating test cases, and ensuring software quality through thorough testing processes.

title: Data Analyst
description: Proficient in analyzing large datasets to extract actionable insights, using tools like Excel, SQL, and Python. Skilled in data visualization, trend analysis, and creating reports that support informed decision-making.

title: Graphics Design
description: Creative graphic designer skilled in transforming ideas into visually compelling designs. Proficient in various software, I specialize in branding, print, and digital media projects.
